name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual document handling causes late compliance submissions. We automate tax document extraction and formatting instead of manual document handling and formatting.
problem_solved: Difficulty in managing supplier tax documents for compliance.
